event_summary: Submission of memorandum to European Commission DG-CNECT AI Office proposing OCPP-AI v1.0 as candidate reference architecture for Article 50 Transparency Guidelines. Concurrent publication of: OCPP-AI v1.0 Core Specification, Anchor Interface Specification v1.0, W3C VC 2.0 JSON-LD context. Concurrent posting to IETF SCITT Working Group mailing list. Concurrent arXiv preprint submission under cs.CR primary classification.

artifact_hashes._note: SHA-256 hashes computed at time of anchoring; populated by foundation_anchor.py at submission time

verifier_instructions: Verify per Article 8 of the OCPP-AI Specification v1.0. The byte-identical content of the artifact URLs above is recoverable from the Bitcoin OP_RETURN anchor record via the verification procedure published at https://spec.ledgerproofhq.io/ocpp-ai-v1.html
operator_notes: This is the second Foundation governance event after gov-2026-06-02-eu-ai-office-consultation (yesterday's Futurium consultation submission). The two events together comprise the Foundation's institutional engagement record on EU AI Act Article 50 for Q2 2026.
